mapper.select: select r.id as roomId, r.name, r.comfort_score as comfortScore, (select count(*) from room_seat s where s.room_id = r.id) as totalSeats, (select count(*) from room_reservation rv join room_seat s2 on rv.seat_id = s2.id and s2.room_id = r.id where date(rv.reservation_in_time) = curdate() and rv.reservation_status in ('已预约','使用中') and (rv.audit_status is null or rv.audit_status in ('无需审核','已通过','待审核'))) as reservedToday from room r

select date_format(reservation_in_time, '%Y-%m') as ym, count(*) as cnt from room_reservation where reservation_in_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 month) group by date_format(reservation_in_time, '%Y-%m') order by ym
select name, comfort_score as comfortScore from room order by comfort_score desc
select user_id as userId, total_effective_minutes as totalMinutes from room_user_study_stats order by total_effective_minutes desc limit 50
select hour(reservation_in_time) as hr, count(*) as cnt from room_reservation where date(reservation_in_time) = curdate() group by hour(reservation_in_time) order by hr
